component.name: aws-bedrock-agent-runtime
component.title: AWS Bedrock Agent Runtime
component.description: Invoke Model of AWS Bedrock Agent Runtime service.
component.label: ai,cloud

knowledgeBaseId.description: Define the Knowledge Base Id we are going to use

lazyStartProducer.label: producer
lazyStartProducer.description: Whether the producer should be started lazy (on the first message). By starting lazy you can use this to allow CamelContext and routes to startup in situations where a producer may otherwise fail during starting and cause the route to fail being started. By deferring this startup to be lazy then the startup failure can be handled during routing messages via Camel's routing error handlers. Beware that when the first message is processed then creating and starting the producer may take a little time and prolong the total processing time of the processing.

modelId.description: Define the model Id we are going to use

overrideEndpoint.description: Set the need for overriding the endpoint. This option needs to be used in combination with the uriEndpointOverride option

pojoRequest.description: If we want to use a POJO request as body or not

profileCredentialsName.description: If using a profile credentials provider, this parameter will set the profile name

region.description: The region in which Bedrock Agent Runtime client needs to work. When using this parameter, the configuration will expect the lowercase name of the region (for example, ap-east-1) You'll need to use the name Region.EU_WEST_1.id()

uriEndpointOverride.description: Set the overriding uri endpoint. This option needs to be used in combination with overrideEndpoint option

useDefaultCredentialsProvider.description: Set whether the Bedrock Agent Runtime client should expect to load credentials through a default credentials provider or to expect static credentials to be passed in.

useProfileCredentialsProvider.description: Set whether the Bedrock Agent Runtime client should expect to load credentials through a profile credentials provider.

autowiredEnabled.label: advanced
autowiredEnabled.description: Whether autowiring is enabled. This is used for automatic autowiring options (the option must be marked as autowired) by looking up in the registry to find if there is a single instance of matching type, which then gets configured on the component. This can be used for automatic configuring JDBC data sources, JMS connection factories, AWS Clients, etc.

bedrockAgentRuntimeAsyncClient.label: advanced
bedrockAgentRuntimeAsyncClient.description: To use an existing configured AWS Bedrock Agent Runtime async client (required for invokeFlow which streams events back).

bedrockAgentRuntimeClient.label: advanced
bedrockAgentRuntimeClient.description: To use an existing configured AWS Bedrock Agent Runtime client

agentAliasId.label: agent
agentAliasId.description: The unique identifier of the agent alias to invoke, used by the invokeAgent operation.

agentId.label: agent
agentId.description: The unique identifier of the agent to invoke, used by the invokeAgent operation.

enableTrace.label: flow,agent
enableTrace.description: Enables tracing for the invokeFlow and agent operations. When enabled, the producer collects the trace events and publishes them in the CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeFlowTraces or CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeAgentTraces header.

foundationModel.label: agent
foundationModel.description: The foundation model used by the invokeInlineAgent operation.

instruction.label: agent
instruction.description: The instruction given to the agent defined by the invokeInlineAgent operation.

sessionId.label: agent
sessionId.description: The unique identifier of the agent session. Reuse the same value across invocations to continue the same conversation. When not set, a random session id is generated for each invocation.

streamOutputMode.label: agent
streamOutputMode.description: The streaming output mode (complete or chunks) used by the agent operations. In complete mode the response chunks are accumulated and the body is the full text. In chunks mode the body is the list of chunks.

flowAliasIdentifier.label: flow
flowAliasIdentifier.description: The unique identifier of the Bedrock flow alias to invoke (used by the invokeFlow operation). Can be overridden per exchange via the CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeFlowAliasIdentifier header.

flowIdentifier.label: flow
flowIdentifier.description: The unique identifier of the Bedrock flow to invoke (used by the invokeFlow operation). Can be overridden per exchange via the CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeFlowIdentifier header.

healthCheckConsumerEnabled.label: health
healthCheckConsumerEnabled.description: Used for enabling or disabling all consumer based health checks from this component

healthCheckProducerEnabled.label: health
healthCheckProducerEnabled.description: Used for enabling or disabling all producer based health checks from this component. Notice: Camel has by default disabled all producer based health-checks. You can turn on producer checks globally by setting camel.health.producersEnabled=true.

proxyHost.label: proxy
proxyHost.description: To define a proxy host when instantiating the Bedrock Agent Runtime client

proxyPort.label: proxy
proxyPort.description: To define a proxy port when instantiating the Bedrock Agent Runtime client

proxyProtocol.label: proxy
proxyProtocol.description: To define a proxy protocol when instantiating the Bedrock Agent Runtime client

sessionToken.label: security
sessionToken.description: Amazon AWS Session Token used when the user needs to assume an IAM role

trustAllCertificates.label: security
trustAllCertificates.description: If we want to trust all certificates in case of overriding the endpoint

useSessionCredentials.label: security
useSessionCredentials.description: Set whether the Bedrock Agent Runtime client should expect to use Session Credentials. This is useful in a situation in which the user needs to assume an IAM role for doing operations in Bedrock.

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeOperation.description: The operation we want to perform

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeCitations.description: When retrieving and generating a response, this header will contain the citations

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeSessionId.description: When retrieving and generating a response, this header will contain he unique identifier of the session. Reuse the same value to continue the same session with the knowledge base.

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeAgentId.description: The unique identifier of the agent to invoke. Overrides the agentId configured on the endpoint.

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeAgentAliasId.description: The unique identifier of the agent alias to invoke. Overrides the agentAliasId configured on the endpoint.

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeAgentEnableTr.description: Enables tracing for the agent invocation. When set, overrides the enableTrace option on the endpoint.

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeAgentEndSessi.description: Ends the agent session after this invocation.

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeAgentMemoryId.description: The unique identifier of the agent memory to use across sessions.

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeAgentStreamOu.description: The streaming output mode (complete or chunks) for an agent invocation. When set, overrides the streamOutputMode option on the endpoint.

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeAgentFoundati.description: The foundation model used by an inline agent. Overrides the foundationModel configured on the endpoint.

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeAgentInstruct.description: The instruction given to an inline agent. Overrides the instruction configured on the endpoint.

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeAgentTraces.description: When invoking an agent with tracing enabled, this header will contain the list of TracePart emitted during the invocation. The elements are TracePart for invokeAgent and InlineAgentTracePart for invokeInlineAgent.

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeAgentReturnCo.description: When an agent invocation requires the caller to fulfil an action, this header will contain the list of return-control payloads emitted by the agent. The elements are ReturnControlPayload for invokeAgent and InlineAgentReturnControlPayload for invokeInlineAgent.

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeAgentFiles.description: When an agent invocation returns files, this header will contain the files emitted by the agent. The elements are FilePart for invokeAgent and InlineAgentFilePart for invokeInlineAgent.

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeFlowIdentifie.description: The unique identifier of the flow to invoke. Overrides the flowIdentifier configured on the endpoint.

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeFlowAliasIden.description: The unique identifier of the flow alias to invoke. Overrides the flowAliasIdentifier configured on the endpoint.

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeFlowEnableTra.description: Enables tracing for the flow invocation. When set, overrides the enableTrace option on the endpoint.

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeFlowExecution.description: The unique identifier of an in-progress flow execution to continue. Used for multi-turn flow conversations.

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeFlowOutputs.description: When invoking a flow, this header will contain the list of FlowOutputEvent emitted by the flow.

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeFlowTraces.description: When invoking a flow with tracing enabled, this header will contain the list of FlowTraceEvent emitted during execution.

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeFlowCompletio.description: When invoking a flow, this header will contain the reason the flow completed (set when a FlowCompletionEvent is received).

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeRetrievedResu.description: When performing a retrieve operation, this header will contain the list of KnowledgeBaseRetrievalResult chunks returned by the knowledge base.

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeNumberOfResul.description: Overrides the maximum number of results returned by the retrieve operation. Must be a positive Integer; when not set the AWS service default is used.

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeSearchType.description: Overrides the search type used by the retrieve operation. Accepts the AWS SearchType enum (HYBRID, SEMANTIC) or its String representation.

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeNextToken.description: Pagination token used by the retrieve operation. Set on the in-message to request the next page; set on the out-message when the response carries one.

CamelAwsBedrockAgentRuntimeRetrieveGuard.description: When performing a retrieve operation, this header will contain the guardrail action (if any) applied by the knowledge base.
